name: CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T2_TMP_CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T3_TMP_CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm; WITH cte_strip AS ( SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(MBR_ID)) AS MBR_ID, LTRIM(RTRIM(MDL_NM)) AS MDL_NM, TOT_SCORE, RX_SCORE, MED_SCORE, IP_SCORE, OP_SCORE, PHYS_SCORE, ER_SCORE, OTHR, AGE, LTRIM(RTRIM(GNDR)) AS GNDR, EXPSR_MO, PRIOR_CST_TOT, PRIOR_CST_MED, PRIOR_CST_RX, CATLCD, UNCATLCD, CATNDC, UNCATNDC, VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T1_TMP_CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm ), cte_business_rules AS ( SELECT cte_strip.*, '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' + ';' + cte_strip.MBR_ID + ';' + cte_strip.MDL_NM + ';' + '@{pipeline().parameters.YearMo}' AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, '@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp}' AS FIRST_RECYC_TS, 0 AS INDV_BE_MARA_RSLT_SK, CAST(cte_strip.MBR_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS INDV_BE_KEY, cte_strip.MDL_NM AS MDL_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.YearMo}' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk}' AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM cte_strip ) SELECT PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, FIRST_RECYC_TS, INDV_BE_MARA_RSLT_SK, INDV_BE_KEY, MDL_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, GNDR, PRIOR_CST_MED, PRIOR_CST_RX, PRIOR_CST_TOT, CATLCD, UNCATLCD, EXPSR_MO, CATNDC, UNCATNDC, AGE, ER_SCORE, IP_SCORE, MED_SCORE, OTHR, OP_SCORE, RX_SCORE, PHYS_SCORE, TOT_SCORE, VRSN_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T2_TMP_CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm FROM cte_business_rules; SELECT INDV_BE_KEY, MDL_ID, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T3_TMP_CblTalnIdsIndvBeMaraRsltXfrm FROM cte_business_rules;
